title: Blackberry Dynamics for mobile management integration

posts.author: crd273 (Christopher Dong)
posts.cookedHtml: In regulated environments, security policies and controls necessitate DLP management by preventing access from non-internal IP addresses. Doing so inhibits use of mobile app on non-corporate networks. In order to provide mobile experience, please support Blackberry Dynamics for mobile management, which our regulated environment has deployed.

posts.author: rose45scott (Rose Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Christopher Dong:

In regulated environments, security policies and controls necessitate DLP management by preventing EZPassMD login access from non-internal IP addresses. Doing so inhibits use of mobile app on non-corporate networks. In order to provide mobile experience, please support Blackberry Dynamics for mobile management, which our regulated environment has deployed.

Hello,
That’s a very clear explanation of the challenge you’re facing in your regulated environment! You’re looking for a way to provide a mobile app experience while adhering to strict security policies that restrict access based on IP addresses and your organization’s existing deployment of Blackberry Dynamics for mobile management.

Integrating with Blackberry Dynamics would indeed be a sensible approach to address this. It would allow your users to securely access the mobile app on non-corporate networks while maintaining the necessary DLP controls enforced by your organization.

Best regards,
Rose
